cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Paul through Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margaret's relationship with Paul is strained by Raymond's return and her health crisis, but Paul provides comfort and support, leading to their reunion and departure together.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tense with Paul over Raymond's return

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hostage Confrontation with Gary
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margaret defends herself against intruder Gary, is taken hostage, defiantly asserts her Tourette's, and is rescued after a violent confrontation, surviving unharmed.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Survived shooting and released from captivity

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Distress and Health Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margaret experiences emotional distress, first seeking help from a psychic hotline and later breaking down over an HMO denial letter, highlighting her vulnerability and unaddressed health issues.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Distressed and crying over HMO denial

cross_scene_arcs.title: Insurance Fraud Scheme
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Paul attempts to cash Raymond's life insurance, resorts to identity fraud and media pressure, is confronted by Raymond for a share, and accepts a settlement to avoid exposure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Insurance claim denied due to legal waiting period.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Settlement accepted to end insurance investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Raymond's return and demand for money complicate the settlement.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Corpse Concealment and Threats
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Paul discovers a corpse, hides it, is threatened by Gary to deliver the body and money, leading to a violent climax where Margaret is shot but survives.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Discovers a dead body in a dumpster.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margaret survives shooting, Raymond is shot, immediate threats resolved.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The circumstances of the corpse's death remain unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Marriage Crisis and Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Paul hides criminal actions from Margaret, later confides in Raymond about her affairs and agrees to harmful advice, but after a traumatic shooting, they reconcile and leave together.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reconciled and departing together for a new start.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuit of the Barnell Insurance Case
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ted denies an insurance claim, suspects fraud, is removed from the case, secretly investigates with Cam's help, confronts Paul Barnell, faces physical assaults, and is overruled by his boss.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ted denies Paul Barnell's claim based on Alaska's seven-year missing person law.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: After violent confrontations and professional setbacks, the case is closed by authority, but Ted remains suspicious.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The truth about the murder and Paul Barnell's guilt remains unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Tiffany
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Career stress causes an argument with Tiffany, but she later assists in the case, leading to reconciliation and a strengthened partnership.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ted and Tiffany argue over his work obsession, and she storms off.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tiffany joins Ted in finding Margaret, and they share a romantic moment, repairing their relationship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Setback and Ethical Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ted follows insurance rules strictly but is overruled when he suspects fraud, leading to professional disappointment, yet he finds ethical reassurance in his actions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ted adheres to legal requirements in denying the Barnell claim.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Demoralized by his colleague's promotion and ordered to apologize, but ethically settled with Tiffany's support.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His professional standing is compromised, but he accepts it.
